# v1.0.12

## 修复

- `rules.example.toml` 补充 AI Review 新配置项，确保 release 包内示例与实际功能一致。

## 配置项

```toml
[[ai_reviews]]
request_timeout_seconds = 30
second_pass_on_clean = false
batch_review = false
max_batch_diff_bytes = 30000
max_batches = 6
```

## 发布包

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v1.0.12-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v1.0.12-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
